<!-- Generated: 2026-05-26T19:03:21-06:00 -->

# Emma capabilities

Emma has 36 registered tools.

| Tool | What it does |
| --- | --- |
| `browser_click` | Click an element. `selector` accepts CSS, ``text=...``, or ``role=...``. |
| `browser_do` | Run a multi-step browser task described in natural language. |
| `browser_navigate` | Open `url` in Emma's persistent Chromium window. |
| `browser_screenshot` | Capture the current page. Returns the PNG path. |
| `browser_type` | Type `text` into a focused field matching `selector`. |
| `current_time` | Return the current time. Pass `timezone` as an IANA name |
| `describe_capabilities` | Tell Garcia what Emma can do, in one or two short spoken sentences. |
| `describe_my_health` | Run the health check and speak the result. |
| `forget_fact` | Delete a fact (or facts) matching the given content from long-term memory. |
| `get_preferred_app` | Tell the user which app Emma is currently using for a category. |
| `health_check` | Check Emma's external dependencies (OpenAI, ElevenLabs, Postgres, Playwright) |
| `latest_video_from_creator` | Open the most recent video from a YouTube creator/channel. |
| `lock_screen` | Lock the screen (control+command+Q). |
| `mute` | Mute the system output. |
| `next_track` | Skip to the next track. |
| `now_playing` | Tell the user what is currently playing. |
| `open_application` | Open a macOS application by display name (e.g. "Spotify", "Safari", "Notes"). |
| `open_url` | Open a URL in the user's default browser. |
| `open_workspace_for_debugging` | Open Emma's source for live editing, then stop the running service. |
| `pause` | Pause whatever is playing. |
| `play_playlist` | Play a playlist by name from the user's Spotify library. |
| `play_track` | Search for a track or artist and start playing the top result on Spotify. |
| `previous_track` | Go to the previous track. |
| `recall_facts` | Look up what Emma already knows about Garcia. |
| `remember_fact` | Save a durable fact about Garcia to long-term memory. |
| `resume` | Resume playback. |
| `run_command` | Run a simple shell command on Garcia's Mac and return the output. |
| `search_and_open` | Search YouTube and open the top video result in the browser. |
| `search_web` | Search the web for `query` and return a short spoken synthesis plus the top results. |
| `set_brightness` | Set the display brightness. `percent` is 0-100. |
| `set_default_browser` | Set the system default browser (URL handler for http/https). |
| `set_preferred_app` | Save the user's preferred app for a category. |
| `set_volume` | Set the system output volume. `percent` is 0-100. |
| `sleep_display` | Put the display to sleep immediately. |
| `summarize_page` | Fetch a web page and return a three-sentence spoken summary. |
| `unmute` | Unmute the system output. |
